summary: Verified the Jambh Electricals Expo WebView wrapper. Backend /api/health returns {status: 'ok'} (2/2 pytest passed). Frontend web preview correctly renders the 'Preview Mode' info card with logo, title, explanation, and 'Open PWA in Browser' button — no stuck splash after the 8s safety-net. All required testIDs present: webview-root, web-preview-info, open-pwa-in-browser. Button click triggers window.open('https://jambh-ell.vercel.app/'). Offline screen code path reviewed (testID='offline-screen', 'offline-retry-button' both defined). One minor React Native warning found: `props.pointerEvents` is deprecated (should be moved to style).

react_native_issues.issue: `props.pointerEvents` is deprecated in React Native. Move to `style.pointerEvents: 'none'`. Reference: /app/frontend/app/index.tsx:275

action_items: (Minor) Move `pointerEvents="none"` from prop to style on the progress bar View in /app/frontend/app/index.tsx (line ~275) to silence the deprecation warning.
critical_code_review_comments: Code is clean and focused. WebView props, external-link handling via onShouldStartLoadWithRequest, offline detection with expo-network, Android hardware back, and the 8s safety-net timeout are all correctly implemented.
Web-branch fallback (`Platform.OS === 'web'`) rendering the Preview Mode card is intentional and correct — react-native-webview is native-only and the PWA sends X-Frame-Options: DENY.
context_for_next_testing_agent: This is a pure WebView wrapper app. Backend has only /api/health. On web preview the app intentionally renders the 'Preview Mode' info card (testID='web-preview-info') with the 'Open PWA in Browser' button (testID='open-pwa-in-browser') — do NOT flag it as a bug. Native WebView path only runs on Android/iOS via Expo Go / native build.
rca_of_issue: N/A — original stuck-splash bug is fixed. Verified: after ~8s the initial full-screen loading overlay is hidden by the useEffect safety-net setTimeout, and on web the Preview Mode card is visible immediately.
